basic_details.job_title: NIPER Hajipur – Junior Civil Engineer, Accounts Officer and More – 8 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur) Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Junior Civil Engineer, Accounts Officer and More Posts. Candidates with Bachelor's degree to PhD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIPER official website niperhajipur.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications range from Bachelor's degree to PhD, with specific experience requirements for each post.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIPER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Jr Civil Engineer, Accounts Officer and More Posts
